description: Wilhelm is drafted into the Wehrmacht for short training with 8. Battr./Art. Regt. 256 (later 2./844), quartered in barracks.
First night of the deployment as the 3rd wave in the Polish campaign; after a short midday arrival, vehicles are parked in the yard and everyone goes to bed early.
After driving via Prague and Königgrätz, quartered in a former Czech barracks, sleeping on straw, barracks drill and exercises in the field. The local population very passive and reserved.
After 2 days and nights of rail transport, arrives in the west via the Rhine at Rüdesheim; further training at the military training grounds.
New garrison, peacetime-style duty. Marianne and Frau Fankhänel and Frau Behr visit. Getting noticed and punitive drill. Lots of pub time with Skat, chess, and billiards.
After departing Oggersheim at midnight and a dreadfully cold ride, one night in a private billet with very kind people.
Tuesday drives toward Westphalia, by evening takes quarters near Paderborn; reception by the local population is poor.

Arrives Wednesday afternoon at the new destination, 'stockkath.' (strongly Catholic). Private billet at Küdde's with Auer, Bachinger and Müller. Chimneys full of sausage and ham, the locals stingy. Promoted to Oberkanonier.
Quartered in a grand hotel, straw piled up in the hall, about 30 km from Dortmund, a winter-sports stay. Wilhelm spends New Year's and January here.
Short medical-orderly course with Meinel and Max, comfortable duty but poor quarters.
Back in Nottuln; now lodges with a worker in the housing estate with 6 children, later at the Schürmanns' with full board. Now drives the battery officer in the Kübelwagen.

place: Village on the Dutch border (near Borken)
description: Position change, on a farm a quarter-hour from the orderly room. Unfair treatment by the new major, SS company next door, sharp duty, ammunition is being loaded up.
Easter is spent with forest runs and Skat; flak can be heard from the industrial area. Exercise maneuvers with all the trimmings. Telephone Weseke 268.
The nice quarters in Weseke are traded for a modest bed of straw. Helga is born on 1940-05-07 in Chemnitz.
